_warning: Feature definitions are IMMUTABLE. Only 'passes' and 'status' fields may be modified. IT IS CATASTROPHIC TO REMOVE OR EDIT FEATURE DEFINITIONS.

features.name: Configurable join key via --key CLI argument
features.description: User specifies join column at runtime with --key <column_name>. Falls back to auto-detection if not provided.
acceptanceCriteria: python merge_csv.py --key Custid joins on Custid correctly
Missing --key falls back to auto-detection of common columns
Key column not found in either file → error listing available columns
No hardcoded column names remain in script

subtasks.name: Validate --key exists in both files; error with column list if not

features.name: Upsert logic
features.description: Rows matching on key: merge with input2 values overwriting input1. Rows only in input1: kept unchanged. Rows only in input2: inserted.
acceptanceCriteria: Row in input1 matching input2 key → output contains input2 values
Row in input1 with no match in input2 → kept unchanged in output
Row in input2 with no match in input1 → inserted into output
Output row count = updated + unchanged + inserted

subtasks.name: Extract upsert(df1, df2, key) helper using column-union approach

features.name: Conflict resolution: input2 always wins
features.description: For matching rows, all non-key columns from input2 overwrite input1, including blank/NaN values.
acceptanceCriteria: For a matched row, all non-key input2 values appear in output (not input1 values)
Blank/NaN in input2 still overwrites input1 value

subtasks.name: Implement column-union in upsert() so df2 cols always overwrite df1 (including NaN)

features.name: Console audit trail
features.description: Print per-category row counts to console: Updated / Unchanged / Inserted / Total.
acceptanceCriteria: Console prints: Updated X | Unchanged Y | Inserted Z | Total N rows
Counts match the actual rows in merged_file.csv
Final output table printed to console

subtasks.name: Wire main() to use parse_args + upsert + derive + filter + write
Print audit line: Updated X | Unchanged Y | Inserted Z | Total N
Remove all hardcoded column references from script body

features.name: Derived field computation
features.description: Preserve TotalAmount = SubsAmount x SubsTerm (formatted $N,NNN) and SubStart reformatted from SubStartDate.
acceptanceCriteria: Output filtered to output.csv schema columns

subtasks.name: Retain existing derive_fields logic unchanged (already working)
